meanings: two-stroke water radical or ice radical (no. 15)
counter for guns, tools, leaves or cakes of something
road with walls on both sides
twelfth sign of the Chinese zodiac
counter for carriages (e.g., in a train)
sign of the hare or rabbit

爾.huneum: 너 이/꽃 많고 성한 모양 이

meanings: sign of the ox or cow
water in which rice has been washed
